Harry Potter series
53.1K  9K  1.8K  Books » Harry Potter
3k+A Shadowed Soul » by devilblondie He was abandoned at a young age, the world believing him dead. They were wrong. Death Eaters believed untouchable are dying. Who is this assassin? Will he join Dumbledore or take the war into his own hands? Not typical powerful!politic!Harry.
T, English, Adventure & Suspense, chapters: 26, words: 100k+, favs: 10k+, follows: 11k+, updated: Feb 25, 2023 published: Jul 16, 2007, Harry P., Hermione G., N. Tonks, Blaise Z.
10k+Partially Kissed Hero » by Perfect Lionheart Summer before third year Harry has a life changing experience, and a close encounter with a dementor ends with him absorbing the horcrux within him. Features Harry with a backbone.
T, English, Fantasy & Humor, chapters: 103, words: 483k+, favs: 13k+, follows: 11k+, updated: Apr 29, 2012 published: May 6, 2008, Harry P.
4k+Weres Harry? » by DobbyElfLord Dark curses don't play nice- not even with each other. When nine year-old Harry is bitten by a werewolf, the horcrux fights back. The result could only happen to Harry Potter. Canon-ish for the first three years of Hogwarts - AU from that point forward.
T, English, Humor & Adventure, chapters: 23, words: 152k+, favs: 11k+, follows: 11k+, updated: Aug 15, 2014 published: May 11, 2012, Harry P.
3k+Back Again, Harry? » by Jedi Buttercup WIP. Harry makes a different choice in King's Cross and is given the double edged gift of a second chance. Time Travel AU, DH canon.
T, English, Drama, chapters: 20, words: 74k+, favs: 8k+, follows: 11k+, updated: Jan 12, 2017 published: Jul 31, 2007, Harry P., Ron W., Hermione G.
9k+Realizations » by Wishweaver Harry returns to Privet Drive after 4th year and finds it...empty! What do you do when you can't go to your friends for help? Additional Story Notes FYI: a. AU Summer before Fifth Year Fic, b. Not particularly fast paced.
K+, English, Drama, chapters: 36, words: 264k+, favs: 14k+, follows: 11k+, updated: Nov 17, 2010 published: Mar 6, 2003, Harry P.
3k+Forging the Sword » by Myst Shadow ::Year 2 Divergence:: What does it take, to reshape a child? And if reshaped, what then is formed? Down in the Chamber, a choice is made. (Harry's Gryffindor traits were always so much scarier than other peoples'.)
T, English, Adventure, chapters: 15, words: 152k+, favs: 9k+, follows: 11k+, updated: Aug 20, 2014 published: May 26, 2007, Harry P., Ron W., Hermione G.
3k+ Time to Put Your Galleons Where Your Mouth Is » by Tsume Yuki Harry had never been able to comprehend a sibling relationship before, but he always thought he'd be great at it. Until, as Master of Death, he's reborn one Turais Rigel Black, older brother to Sirius and Regulus. (Rebirth/time travel and Master of Death Harry)
T, English, Family & Adventure, chapters: 21, words: 46k+, favs: 27k+, follows: 11k+, updated: Jan 14, 2015 published: Aug 11, 2014, Harry P., Sirius B., Regulus B., Walburga B.
2k+The Mind Arts » by Wu Gang What is more terrifying? A wizard who can kick down your door or a wizard who can look at you and know your every thought? Harry's journey into the mind arts begins with a bout of accidental magic and he practices it and hungers for the feelings it brings. [Major Canon Divergences beginning Third Year.]
T, English, Romance & Supernatural, chapters: 43, words: 248k+, favs: 9k+, follows: 11k+, updated: Dec 13, 2024 published: Nov 28, 2017, Harry P., Albus D., Daphne G., Gellert G.
4k+ The Perils of Innocence » by avidbeader AU. In an institute to help children with psychological issues, a child is abandoned by his guardians because he does extraordinary things. Rather than fear him, the doctors work to help him try to control this ability. They discover other children with these incredible powers. And then odd letters arrive one summer day. Future H/Hr. Permanently unfinished.
K, English, Drama, chapters: 35, words: 103k+, favs: 8k+, follows: 10k+, updated: Aug 14, 2025 published: Aug 15, 2012, Harry P., Hermione G., Minerva M., Dean T.
10k+ Make A Wish » by Rorschach's Blot Harry has learned the prophesy and he does not believe that a schoolboy can defeat Voldemort, so he decides that if he is going to die then he is first going to live.
T, English, Humor & Adventure, chapters: 50, words: 187k+, favs: 27k+, follows: 10k+, updated: Jun 17, 2006 published: Mar 23, 2005, Harry P.
2k+ A Chance Encounter » by spectre4hire What if Harry didn't bump into the Weasleys at Kings Cross on his first day? What if he met another family? A family that knew his parents. This simple encounter will set him on a different path including new friends and new ambitions. Includes: Slytherin!Harry, Good!Dumbledore, Conflicted!Snape, & Supportive!Remus. Future HP/DG & HG/TN. Years 1-2. Complete! The Sequel is posted.
T, English, Drama & Friendship, chapters: 28, words: 226k+, favs: 12k+, follows: 10k+, updated: Mar 14, 2017 published: May 31, 2011, [Harry P., Daphne G.] Theodore N., Tracey D.
3k+Adventures in Magick » by PseudonymousEntity "What Would A Hero Do?" Newly crowned wizard and avid reader of fantasy fiction, eleven-year-old Harry Potter makes friends with the goblin standing outside Gringotts with unforeseen consequences. Armed with an unlikely posse -his insatiable curiosity- and a pocket full of questions, Curious!Harry embarks on his first year at Hogwarts. Merlin help us.
T, English, Adventure & Humor, chapters: 32, words: 111k+, favs: 9k+, follows: 10k+, updated: Jun 22, 2019 published: Dec 16, 2015, Harry P.
3k+ Laughing All the Way to London » by AppoApples Harry is a single father trying to raise his godson, Teddy. Unable to ensure his son's safety in the wizarding world he goes into hiding in the muggle one. But one trip to London will undo all of his precautions. Thrown back to the past, Harry finds himself falling into the arms of a woman who once spared his life. No paradox,Light/BadassHarry. T/M rated.
T, English, Family & Mystery, chapters: 30, words: 124k+, favs: 10k+, follows: 10k+, updated: Jul 26, 2021 published: Jan 9, 2019, [Harry P., Narcissa M.] Teddy L.
8k+Family Bonds » by xXDesertRoseXx When, after that fateful Halloween night, the wrong Potter twin is hailed the Boy Who Lived, how will Harry's life turn out? With a power he knows not, an ancient prophecy and one Severus Snape practically raising him, interesting at least is a given.
T, English, Family & Adventure, chapters: 76, words: 517k+, favs: 10k+, follows: 10k+, updated: Jul 6, 2014 published: Jan 9, 2012, Harry P., Severus S.
2k+Prodigal Delinquent » by Ethereal Euphoria AU. Little Harry Potter knew from the moment he defied the laws of gravity and made a pebble accelerate at a freefall of 8.9 m/s 2, that he was going to have fun learning about the rules of all the known universe… and breaking every single one of them. WARNING: Sporadic Updates.
T, English, Humor & Adventure, chapters: 16, words: 72k+, favs: 8k+, follows: 10k+, updated: Oct 20, 2019 published: Jun 4, 2008, Harry P.
5k+Growing Up Black » by Elvendork Nigellus What if Harry had been rescued from the Dursleys at age six and raised as the heir of the Noble and Most Ancient, etc.? This is the weird and wonderful story of Aries Sirius Black. AU. Part I complete. Part II complete. (Warning: Part II ends on a cliffhanger. If you dislike that fact, Part II, Chapter 35, might be a better place to stop reading.) Part III is on indefinite hiatus.
T, English, Family, chapters: 70, words: 235k+, favs: 10k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Aug 20, 2019 published: Nov 30, 2010, Harry P., Sirius B., Draco M., Marius B.
3k+Travel Secrets: Third » by E4mj Harry's now going into his 3rd year again & it's getting complicated. Sirius still escaped & Harry has to deal with Slytherin politics & some extra timetravel on top of old drama. Rescuing Sirius is the number one mission, but things keep reverting & Harry is worried he can't change a Thing. Dumbledore/Goodguys bashing. 3rd in series. Rated M coz I'm paranoid. It all belongs to Jo!
T, English, chapters: 31, words: 175k+, favs: 7k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Dec 31, 2016 published: Feb 24, 2014, Harry P.
4k+Café » by Pleasedial123 Harry stared out the Dursely car window morosely. 'I would have went with Sirius if he had asked.' He thought. 'I would have run from the law and Durselys with him.' He paused, blinking. 'I could do that on my own! I could run away' Summer after 3rd year
T, English, chapters: 28, words: 136k+, favs: 9k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Aug 17, 2014 published: Jun 30, 2010, Harry P.
6k+Magical Relations » by evansentranced AU First Year onward: Harry's relatives were shocked when the Hogwarts letters came. Not because Harry got into Hogwarts. They had expected that. But Dudley, on the other hand...That had been a surprise. Currently in 5th year. *Reviews contain SPOILERS!*
T, English, Humor & Drama, chapters: 71, words: 269k+, favs: 8k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Mar 10, 2016 published: Mar 18, 2007, Harry P., Dudley D.
4k+ Long Live The Queen » by offsides With Harry Potter's hearing for Underage Use of Magic looming, and Sirius Black hunted for a crime he didn't commit and was never tried for, Harry reaches out to Her Majesty the Queen for help, with unexpected results. No ships. AU starting Ch 6-9 OotP, No HBP, No DH, No Horcruxes. COMPLETE
K+, English, chapters: 44, words: 174k+, favs: 13k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Oct 27, 2016 published: Sep 11, 2015, Harry P., Sirius B.
10k+ Enchanting Melodies » by athassprkr Harry Potter was an odd boy, everyone knew it. His eyes were too aware, he was intelligent for it to be natural. This remained a mystery, even to the boy himself, until one day he remembered the man he used to be. Alas, the magical world is far more treacherous than the one in his past life and he will either succumb or rise above them all. Will he be up to the challenge? SI!Harry
T, English, Adventure & Fantasy, chapters: 471, words: 1161k+, favs: 9k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Jun 19, 2025 published: Mar 3, 2023, Harry P., Daphne G.
1k+Petrichor » by SometimeWriter1 The horcrux is destroyed by the basilisk's venom. With the weight removed from his soul the magical world opens up before Harry. His parents were considered some of the best of their generation and Harry is going to prove he is their son.
T, English, Fantasy, chapters: 30, words: 139k+, favs: 7k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Dec 23, 2024 published: Jun 13, 2021, [Harry P., Daphne G.]
4k+ The Last Peverell » by animerocker646 Being the Master of Death made life difficult, especially when you need to save all of magical Europe from inbreeding its way to extinction. At least Death was enjoying watching his Master attempt this over and over again. Harry didn't find it nearly as entertaining. Well, tenth times the charm right? (FemHarry)
T, English, Adventure & Romance, chapters: 112, words: 400k+, favs: 9k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Jul 2, 2021 published: Dec 2, 2017, Harry P., Sirius B., Remus L., James P.
7k+ Fixing Past Mistakes » by DebsTheSlytherinSnapefan Harry didn't appear at Hogwarts causing concern. Albus immediately head's out to Privet Drive to find out what was going on, along with Minerva and a reluctant Severus Snape. What they find out changes everything for everyone in the wizarding world. Is there a chance for anyone to go back and fix past mistakes? is there any hope at all for the magical world? COMPLETE
T, English, chapters: 52, words: 230k+, favs: 11k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Jun 28, 2017 published: Feb 11, 2014, Harry P., Severus S., Albus D., Minerva M.
5k+ The Accidental Animagus » by White Squirrel Harry escapes the Dursleys with a unique bout of accidental magic and eventually winds up at the Grangers' house. Now, he has what he always wanted: a loving family, and he'll need their help to take on the magical world and vanquish the dark lord who has pursued him from birth. Years 1-4. Sequel posted.
T, English, chapters: 112, words: 697k+, favs: 11k+, follows: 9k+, updated: Jul 30, 2016 published: Nov 21, 2013, Harry P., Hermione G.
